title: AI That Composes and Creates Sound
modules: Copyright in the Age of AI Audio
Producers and AI: Collaboration or Competition
The Future Soundscape of AI Music
synopsis: Discover how artificial intelligence is transforming music composition, sound design, and voice generation — from apps that write songs in seconds to tools that clone human voices with startling accuracy. This course equips learners to use, evaluate, and think critically about AI audio tools shaping entertainment, media, and creative industries.
rationale: As AI audio generation becomes embedded in streaming platforms, advertising, and social media, learners without foundational literacy in this area are unprepared to navigate its creative, legal, and ethical implications.
